title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #10, Shanks, Unknown person #11, Lilith, Unknown person #12 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Watch it, S-Shark!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BeAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: HOOEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He just used a beam!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah! Reckon this is gettin' real risky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who in Tarnation is this guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: The Sepharim's still just a kid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ain't meant to put it through a laser test till later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You said it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does he have the faintest idea how much ONE seraphim costs?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll rip his blasted skull off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah Wudn't go that far....!!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Don'tcha think that's a bit too evil?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OH!! EUREKA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah!'ve just thought up a new invention!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah'll leave the rest to you, pythagoras!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah hafta jot down the blueprints right away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My hands are always so full!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, AH'd even take help from the cat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't come across Battle Data this rich every day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: meow!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a once in a lifetime opportunity! Let's get some input, input, input!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The ideas won't stop flown'!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: york, be a doll and eat somethin' for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sure thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Munch munch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Delicious-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bring seconds for Dr. York!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Her current BMI is over 600!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Seraphim's attack patterns have continued to develop as it grows!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That suggests that one's Lneage factor really does store some of our recollections and capabilities!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should try and accelerate their growth, although that presents new obstacles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Green Blood Concentration has risen and heart rate is up to 90 BPM!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaah! I really need the toilet! I'd go myself, but I can't afford to waste any time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Flesshhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAA- Ahh...

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
